title: Feature request: Add to be able to reply & like emails & activties widget notes/meetings/etc
excerpt: Feature request: Add to be able to reply & like emails & activities widget notes/meetings/etc for internal discussions after info received

posts.author: ChristineWLF (Christine)
posts.cookedHtml: Feature request: Add to be able to reply & like emails & activities widget notes/meetings/etc for internal discussions after info received

posts.author: TierneyM (Tierney)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to second this feature request. Can Monday.com reply with whether this is something that they would consider adding?

posts.author: claragrainger (Clara Grianger)
posts.cookedHtml: I also second this request! The ability to like and reply to notes would be a game changer.

posts.author: alyssaortiz (Alyssa Ortiz )
posts.cookedHtml: I also second this request! Even though you can reply and like using the updates tab, our office uses the emails & activities tab more frequently because you can specify what type of activity it is. Being able to reply to these internal discussions would be very helpful!

posts.author: Mberkower (Megan Berkower)
posts.cookedHtml: I also second this request! This would be very helpful.

posts.author: KateJ (Kate Jung)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to second this request!

posts.author: FernandaO (Fernanda)
posts.cookedHtml: I also second this request. It would be very helpful for our team.

posts.author: Claudia (Claudia Sanchez)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to second this request. The ability to like and reply to internal discussions on the email & activities tab would be extremely beneficial to the communication of our team!

posts.author: swm1790 (Sara Williams-Mann)
posts.cookedHtml: Please let us know if you can make this change. It would make our communication much more effecient. Thank you!

posts.author: Mar_Armstrong (Marlise Armstrong)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would hugely help my team’s ability to communicate effectively and efficiently! Please consider adding it.
